Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
RICHARD L. BECKMAN, ESQ.(BECKMAN MARQUEZ, LLP), (415)495-8500, PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY DEBBIE SHU
NO APPEARANCE MADE BY THE DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DEBBIE SHU'S Motion Awarding Resonable Attorney's Fees In Excess Of Default Schedule IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT THIS WAS AN UNUSUAL CASE JUSTIFYING AN AWARD OF FEES FAR IN EXCESS OF THE FEE SCHEDULE. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
